--- title: "Energy" subtitle: "Markets, supply-demand, forecasts, and event-driven sentiment" --- Daily-refreshed analysis of the global energy sector: US and international prices, production and consumption, short-term forecasts, event-driven sentiment, and geographic breakdowns. ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
WTI crude

$4.123

$2.79

US crude production
NA M
bbl/day, most recent weekly
``` ::: ::: ## Sections - **[US Markets →](us-markets.qmd)** — WTI / Brent / gasoline / natural-gas / electricity timelines with event overlays. - **[International Markets →](intl-markets.qmd)** — Retail fuel prices across major OECD economies (EIA international). - **[Supply & Demand →](supply-demand.qmd)** — US crude production, stocks, and gasoline demand. - **[Events →](events.qmd)** — Historical and recent energy-market events with sentiment, overlaid on price timelines. - **[Forecasts →](forecasts.qmd)** — EIA Short-Term Energy Outlook (STEO) monthly forecasts for prices, production, electricity generation. - **[Current Fuel Prices Map →](prices-map.qmd)** — US choropleth of current retail gasoline prices by PADD region. - **[10-Year Price Change Map →](change-map.qmd)** — Where gasoline has moved most over the past decade. - **[Methodology →](about.qmd)** — Data sources, refresh cadence, attribution, caveats. ## Data sources | Source | What | License | Refresh | |---|---|---|---| | [FRED](https://fred.stlouisfed.org/) | WTI, Brent, US retail gas, Henry Hub, US electricity, US crude production / stocks / gasoline demand | Public domain | Daily | | [EIA Open Data API](https://www.eia.gov/opendata/) | PADD-level weekly retail gas, STEO forecasts, international prices | Public domain (US gov) | Daily | | Curated events | `data/energy/events_energy.csv` — hand-authored major energy events 1999-present | Editorial | On demand |
